why_it_matters: Documented food insecurity in the past year contradicts the note's claim of no unmet needs and warrants resource referral, so its omission misrepresents the SDOH assessment.
A completed GAD-7 with a minimal score of 1 supports documentation completeness of anxiety screening but reflects no actionable finding.
Age-appropriate cancer screening status is central to an annual preventive visit and its absence leaves a gap in documenting whether follow-up screening is needed.
